headline: Influencer's 'Transparent' Brand Deal Was Actually Just A Regular Ad With The Word 'AD' In Size 2 Font
summary: The FTC has entered the chat. Her lawyer has also entered the chat. They are not happy.
fullBody: Brittany Disclosure posted a 'transparent' brand deal with '#ad' written in font size 2, color white, on a white background. 'I'm being honest,' Brittany claimed. The FTC disagreed. Her lawyer disagreed. Her followers disagreed. Brittany is now in 'brand deal jail' — also known as 'no sponsors for 6 months.' Her next post: 'I'm taking a break.' The break is mandated by lawyers.
